source.author: anthony-chaudhary
source.provenance: WITNESSED by the issue owner on the M3 Pro. This artifact archives the reported numbers because the raw run log and prompt text were not present in this checkout.

machine.name: node-macos-a
machine.spec: Apple M3 Pro / Mac15,7, 18 GPU core, 36 GB unified, macOS 26.5, Metal 4

reproduce.command_template: FAK_Q4K=1 FAK_METAL=1 FAK_QPROFILE=1 go run -tags fakmetal ./cmd/fakchat -gguf ~/.cache/fak-models/gguf/Qwen3.6-27B.q4_k_m.gguf -tok ~/.cache/fak-models/tokenizers/qwen3.6 -p <prompt> -n 1 -quiet
reproduce.note: The issue comment reports tokenized prompt lengths P=27 and P=940, but does not include the raw prompt strings. Reproduction requires prompts tokenizing to those lengths.

decode.note: Carried forward from the 2026-06-26 clean Metal Q4_K run; the 2026-06-28 issue comment reports prefill refreshes, not a new decode remeasure.

correctness.first_token: greedy first token remains <think>, matching the CPU path
correctness.gpu_path: GPU q4k GEMM confirmed running for all 184 resident weights

interpretation.claim: Measured fak-Metal Q4_K prefill progression on M3 Pro after #1085; decode remains the prior witnessed 1.2 tok/s until #67 remeasures the resident-forward delta.
interpretation.verdict: trails llama.cpp Metal; no pass claimed
interpretation.remaining_gap: The issue comment attributes the remaining prefill gap to one-time 8.33 GB weight upload plus per-call GPU round-trip/waitUntilCompleted and result memcpy, tracked in #1113 and #69.
